channel.title: morningNewsPolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsPolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Houston changes ordinance limiting cooperation with ICE after pressure from governor
item.description: A Houston city ordinance that limited police officers' cooperation with federal immigration agents was amended on Wednesday after Texas' governor thre...

item.title: Current price of oil as of April 23, 2026
item.description: When oil prices change, it affects your energy costs—and even the price of everyday items. Here’s why.

item.title: Discovering Raimundo de Madrazo and Spain’s Sparkling 19th Century
item.description: The Meadows Museum in Dallas shows us there’s lots happening in Spanish art between Goya and Picasso.

item.title: The SPLC Is A Hedge Fund With A Dumb Anti-Racism Newsletter
item.description: At the SPLC, Moser wrote, staff joked that they would keep at their work 'Until justice rolls down like dollars.'

item.title: Parents push Congress to act on kids' online safety after juries find Meta and YouTube liable for harm
item.description: Roughly 70 parents traveled to the U.S. Capitol to push for online safety legislation after juries found Meta and YouTube liable for harming children.

item.title: Manufacturing Racism
item.description: The Southern Poverty Law Center has been secretly funding ‘informants’ and infiltrators in multiple white supremacist groups around the country, the D...

item.title: The Iran War just made the clean energy transition non-negotiable
item.description: I've spent 20 years making the economic case for clean energy. Hormuz just made the geopolitical case — at the cost of many lives and $126-a-barrel oi...

item.title: MN lawmaker takes action to get answers on Omar's alleged fraud ties after she skips key hearing: 'Ghosted us'
item.description: Rep. Ilhan Omar faces scrutiny after skipping a Minnesota hearing on her potential links to the massive Feeding Our Future pandemic fraud probe.

item.title: The Media Weren’t ‘Truth-Seeking’ Under Biden, So Why Should We Take Them Seriously Now?
item.description: When the Atlantic magazine trots out one of its mostly anonymous defamation pieces against President Trump or one of his allies, it should be conventi...

item.title: Goldman tackles AI’s missing link: the ‘world model’ that every AI godfather is racing to figure out
item.description: The researchers who built modern AI say it's still missing something fundamental. Goldman Sachs explains what—and why the answer could reshape everyth...

item.title: Turkey Is the Weak Link in Trump’s Economic War on Iran
item.description: The nation’s regulatory and commercial environment remains a critical conduit for Tehran.

item.title: Stephen and Ayesha Curry talk about the one habit that separates good business leaders from great ones
item.description: The Currys, co-founders of Plezi Hydration, discuss leading with purpose.

item.title: How Liberal Justices Used A Footnote To Drag Out Dobbs Release Amid Assassination Threats
item.description: After the Dobbs decision overturning Roe v. Wade was leaked in May of 2022, Justice Samuel Alito warned his colleagues that delaying its official rele...

item.title: Carney Gets His Free Hand
item.description: The new Liberal majority in Parliament will continue the Trudeau status quo, with minor modifications.

item.title: Trump admin loosens regulations on state-licensed medical marijuana
item.description: President Donald Trump's administration loosened federal regulations on state-licensed marijuana on Thursday.

item.title: National Republicans Dodge Questions About VA Ground Game As Locals Allege ‘None Of Them Spent Any Money’
item.description: In short, Virginia’s statewide election was a national election. The only problem, frustrated Republicans say, the GOP didn’t get that.

item.title: Groups sue Alaska election officials, allege the sharing of voter data with DOJ was unconstitutional
item.description: Voting and civil rights groups sued Alaska elections officials Wednesday, alleging that their sharing of the state's full voter registration list with...

item.title: Xavier Becerra pressed on 'rumors' he knew about Eric Swalwell's alleged misconduct during CA governor debate
item.description: Xavier Becerra was pressed on his knowledge of Eric Swalwell's sexual misconduct rumors during a California gubernatorial debate Wednesday.

item.title: Key House committee schedules hearing with embattled ActBlue CEO: 'Needs to come clean'
item.description: The House Administration is scheduling a hearing on May 19 with Regina Wallace-Jones, the CEO of the massive Democratic fundraising platform, ActBlue.

item.title: What Business Do Democrats Have in Barcelona?
item.description: Why would they cozy up to ‘global progressives’ in a faraway leftist enclave?

item.title: Inflated AI claims are under fire—and the regulatory reckoning is coming
item.description: A top securities litigation partner at Baker McKenzie argues that history—from dot-com fraud to ESG greenwashing—tells us exactly where AI disclosure ...

item.title: Russiagate Czar Joe DiGenova Is The Best And Last Chance For Accountability
item.description: After a wasted decade, this is both the best opportunity and, realistically, the last real chance to get something done.

item.title: Judge blocks certification of Democrats' win in Virginia redistricting referendum
item.description: A Virginia judge has stopped the state from certifying the results of Tuesday's referendum in which voters narrowly approved Democrats' new gerrymande...

item.title: Navy secretary out in latest high-level departure from Trump's Pentagon
item.description: Secretary of the Navy John C. Phelan has stepped down from his position at the Defense Department in the latest high-profile departure by a Trump admi...

item.title: Kalshi fines and suspends three congressional candidates for wagering on their own elections
item.description: Three congressional candidates are accused of betting on the outcome of their own elections on the prediction market Kalshi, which said Wednesday that...
